name: VisasQ Inc.
summary: VisasQ Inc. provides professional knowledge sharing platform/consulting services for new business and organizational development in Japan. The company offers in-person meeting, phone consultation, survey, site visit, short-term assignment, and seminar and event services. It serves consulting and professional firms, financial institutions, Fortune 500 companies, and small and medium-sized enterprises. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
